hero.subtitle: Your Virtual Assistant
hero.description: I'm Mr. OP, your virtual agent powered by Odisha Police. I'm here to help you access multiple services and support systems that will assist you in times of need.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Docs placeholder - integration guides and API documentation will be here.

whatsappBot.title: OP Agent
whatsappBot.subtitle: Odisha Police Virtual Support
whatsappBot.welcome: Hello. OP Agent is now connected.
whatsappBot.intro: I can help you with phishing URL checks, women harassment complaints, cyber fraud reporting, complaint status tracking, and emergency contacts.
whatsappBot.prompt: Choose a service below or type what you need.
whatsappBot.womenDescription: Open the women safety reporting form
whatsappBot.statusDescription: Track your complaint or case progress
whatsappBot.emergencyDescription: View key helplines and urgent contacts
whatsappBot.phishingReply: Opening the phishing URL detection tool. Paste the suspicious link there and scan it.
whatsappBot.womenReply: Opening the women safety complaint form. Share the incident details there for secure reporting.
whatsappBot.cyberReply: Opening the cyber fraud reporting flow. Keep transaction details and evidence ready.
whatsappBot.statusReply: Opening your status tracker so you can review the latest case progress.
whatsappBot.loginReply: Please sign in first. I am opening the login page so you can continue securely.
whatsappBot.menuReply: Available services: phishing URL search, women harassment complaint, cyber fraud report, complaint status tracking, and emergency help.
whatsappBot.emergencyReply: Emergency contacts: Cyber helpline 1930, Emergency 112, Women helpline 1091, Police 100.
whatsappBot.fallback: I can help with phishing URL search, women safety complaint, cyber fraud report, complaint status, or emergency help. Please pick one of the services below.
whatsappBot.prefill: Hello OP Agent, I need help with an online safety service.
